title: Constitution of Kenya, 2010
excerpt: The supreme law of the Republic of Kenya. Contains 18 chapters and 305 articles covering sovereignty, bill of rights, devolution, judiciary, and governance.

key_articles.supremacy: Article 1 - Constitution is the supreme law of the Republic
key_articles.bill_of_rights: Articles 19-59 - Fundamental rights and freedoms including life, liberty, equality, freedom of expression, religion, association, movement, property, fair trial, privacy, health, education, housing, food, water, clean environment
key_articles.equality: Article 27 - Equality and freedom from discrimination
key_articles.liberty: Article 29 - Freedom and security of person
key_articles.education: Article 43 - Economic and social rights including education
key_articles.health: Article 43 - Right to highest attainable standard of health
key_articles.environment: Article 42 - Right to a clean and healthy environment
key_articles.devolution: Articles 174-200 - County governments, devolved functions, revenue allocation
key_articles.judiciary: Articles 159-174 - Independence of judiciary, court structure, Supreme Court, Court of Appeal, High Court
key_articles.parliament: Articles 95-132 - National Assembly and Senate composition, functions, legislation
key_articles.president: Articles 131-147 - Powers and functions of the President, election, removal
key_articles.citizenship: Articles 16-18 - Acquisition, dual citizenship, loss of citizenship
key_articles.land: Articles 60-81 - Land policy, community land, public land, private land, National Land Commission
key_articles.public_finance: Articles 199-233 - Revenue, taxation, public debt, budgets, audit, Auditor-General
key_articles.national_security: Articles 238-265 - Kenya Defence Forces, National Intelligence Service, police

title: Penal Code
excerpt: An Act of Parliament to establish a code of criminal law defining offences and prescribing punishments.

title: Criminal Procedure Code
excerpt: An Act to regulate criminal procedure in the courts, including arrest, bail, trials, and sentencing.

title: Civil Procedure Act
excerpt: An Act to consolidate and amend the law relating to civil procedure in the courts of Kenya.

title: Employment Act
excerpt: An Act to consolidate and amend the law relating to employment and for connected purposes.

title: Land Act
excerpt: An Act to give effect to the principle that land is held by the people of Kenya collectively as a national resource.

title: Environmental Management and Co-ordination Act
excerpt: An Act to establish a framework for environmental management and to create NEMA.

title: Companies Act
excerpt: An Act to provide for the registration, regulation, and dissolution of companies in Kenya.

title: Income Tax Act
excerpt: An Act to provide for the charging and collection of income tax in Kenya.

title: Value Added Tax Act
excerpt: An Act to impose and provide for the collection of value added tax.

title: Family Protection Act
excerpt: An Act to provide for the protection of family members from domestic violence.

title: Children Act
excerpt: An Act to give effect to Article 53 of the Constitution on the rights of children.

title: Public Finance Management Act
excerpt: An Act to give effect to Article 201 to 209 of the Constitution on public finance management.

title: Access to Information Act
excerpt: An Act to give effect to Article 35 of the Constitution on the right of access to information.

title: Anti-Corruption and Economic Crimes Act
excerpt: An Act to give effect to Chapter Six of the Constitution on leadership and integrity.

title: National Land Commission Act
excerpt: An Act to give effect to Article 67 of the Constitution on the functions and powers of the National Land Commission.

title: Intergovernmental Relations Act
excerpt: An Act to provide for the framework of intergovernmental relations between national and county governments.

title: Elections Act
excerpt: An Act to provide for the conduct of elections and referenda in Kenya.

title: Public Procurement and Asset Disposal Act
excerpt: An Act to provide for the regulation of public procurement and asset disposal by public entities.

title: Data Protection Act
excerpt: An Act to give effect to Article 31(c) and (d) of the Constitution on the right to privacy.

title: Consumer Protection Act
excerpt: An Act to provide for the protection of consumers of goods and services.

title: Insolvency Act
excerpt: An Act to consolidate and amend the law relating to insolvency of individuals and companies.

title: Limited Liability Partnerships Act
excerpt: An Act to provide for the registration and regulation of limited liability partnerships.

title: Competition Act
excerpt: An Act to make provision for the promotion and enforcement of competition in the market.

title: Mutual Legal Assistance Act
excerpt: An Act to provide for mutual legal assistance in criminal matters between Kenya and other states.

title: Traffic Act
excerpt: An Act to make provision for the regulation of motor vehicles, the conduct of persons using roads, and for matters connected therewith.

title: Evidence Act
excerpt: An Act to consolidate and amend the law relating to the law of evidence in Kenya.

title: Law of Contract Act
excerpt: An Act to make provision for the law relating to contracts in Kenya.

title: Sale of Goods Act
excerpt: An Act to make provision for the law relating to the sale of goods.

title: Law of Succession Act
excerpt: An Act to consolidate and amend the law relating to intestate and testamentary succession and the administration of estates of deceased persons.

title: Matrimonial Causes Act
excerpt: An Act to make provision for the law relating to matrimonial causes, including dissolution of marriage, separation, and nullity.

title: Sexual Offences Act
excerpt: An Act to make provision for the prevention and punishment of sexual offences and for connected purposes.

title: Limitation of Actions Act
excerpt: An Act to consolidate and amend the law relating to the limitation of actions.

title: Negotiable Instruments Act
excerpt: An Act to define and amend the law relating to bills of exchange, cheques, promissory notes, and other negotiable instruments.

title: Partnership Act
excerpt: An Act to define and amend the law relating to partnerships.

title: Arbitration Act
excerpt: An Act to make provision for arbitration, including international commercial arbitration.

title: Advocates Act
excerpt: An Act to regulate the profession of advocates, including admission, practice, and discipline.

title: County Governments Act
excerpt: An Act to make provision for the governance and management of county governments.

title: Leadership and Integrity Act
excerpt: An Act to give effect to Chapter Six of the Constitution on leadership and integrity of state officers.

title: Judicial Service Act
excerpt: An Act to make provision for the administration of the Judiciary and the Judicial Service Commission.

title: Supreme Court Act
excerpt: An Act to make provision for the jurisdiction, powers, and procedures of the Supreme Court of Kenya.

title: Fair Administrative Action Act
excerpt: An Act to give effect to Article 47 of the Constitution on the right to fair administrative action.

title: Prevention of Terrorism Act
excerpt: An Act to give effect to international obligations relating to the prevention of terrorism.

title: National Police Service Act
excerpt: An Act to make provision for the organization, administration, and functions of the National Police Service.

title: Banking Act
excerpt: An Act to regulate the business of banking in Kenya.

title: Insurance Act
excerpt: An Act to consolidate and amend the law relating to insurance.

title: Capital Markets Act
excerpt: An Act to make provision for the regulation of capital markets in Kenya.

title: Stamp Duty Act
excerpt: An Act to provide for the collection of stamp duty on instruments and transactions.

title: Land Registration Act
excerpt: An Act to consolidate and amend the law relating to the registration of interests in land.

title: Physical and Land Use Planning Act
excerpt: An Act to make provision for physical and land use planning and development management.

title: Community Land Act
excerpt: An Act to give effect to Article 63 of the Constitution on community land.

title: Public Health Act
excerpt: An Act to make provision for the prevention and suppression of diseases and for the control of public health.

title: Mental Health Act
excerpt: An Act to consolidate and amend the law relating to the care, treatment, and protection of persons with mental disorders.

title: Interpretation and General Provisions Act
excerpt: An Act to make provision for the interpretation of written laws and for related matters.

title: Government Proceedings Act
excerpt: An Act to make provision for the institution of legal proceedings by and against the Government.

title: Work Injury Benefits Act
excerpt: An Act to provide for compensation for work-related injuries and diseases and for connected purposes.

title: Trade Disputes Act
excerpt: An Act to make provision for the resolution of trade disputes and for connected purposes.

title: Proceeds of Crime and Anti-Money Laundering Act
excerpt: An Act to make provision for the confiscation and forfeiture of proceeds of crime and for anti-money laundering measures.

title: Witness Protection Act
excerpt: An Act to make provision for the protection of witnesses in criminal proceedings.

title: Criminal Procedure Code
excerpt: An Act to regulate criminal procedure in the courts, including arrest, bail, trials, and sentencing.
